title: Scene nomenclature cleanup
author: sadkellz
body: This aims to clean up the ambiguous definitions of "Minor" and "Major" used throughout the repo. This idea started a while back during a discord conversation which you find [here](https://discord.com/channels/727908905392275526/727909624342380615/1399217241194631249).

title: Scene nomenclature cleanup
author: decomp-dev[bot]
body:
### Report for GALE01 (0030f76 - eb19533)

No changes

title: Scene nomenclature cleanup
author: PsiLupan
body: LGTM. Like I said before, I think the biggest thing is the community has settled on the Major/Minor thing and it'll just be another difference that'll have to be reconciled eventually.

title: Scene nomenclature cleanup
author: ribbanya
body: Looks good to me but I'll defer to @r-burns or @PsiLupan.
